response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical performances separated by a brief transition. 2. Extracted song metadata from on-screen text for both performances. 3. For Song 1 ('正解はいらない'), identified performer Yukihana Lamy, used search string '"正解はいらない" Neru Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. For Song 2 ('キズナ♡スペシャリティ'), identified performers Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene, recognized it as a cover of the anime song, used search string '"キズナ♡スペシャリティ" Japanese and English lyrics'. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the gathered data and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video segment containing two musical performances by Hololive VTubers, separated by a brief dialogue transition.

scenes.description: Yukihana Lamy performs 'Seikai wa Iranai'. On-screen text indicates songwriter Neru.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
時に僕らは理想を語る非凡な才能の唄人
またキャピタリズムに屈する愚図の癒やし乞い
(瞼の裏側土砂降り)
(今頃会えない君はおやすみ)
(真夜中3時に call me, baby)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Sometimes we are heroes who advise ideas
In other words, it's a charismatic teacher for you
(Inside the back of my eyelids, it's pouring rain)
(I can't meet you, so goodnight)
(Call me, baby, at 3 AM)

scenes.description: Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, and Momosuzu Nene perform 'Kizuna ♡ Specialty'. On-screen text identifies song title.
scenes.song_title: キズナ♡スペシャリティ
scenes.performer_in_video: Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、生まれてから今日までの間
どれくらいのご飯で私たちは出来てるかな
毎日ありがとう
もし食卓からおいしいが消えてしまったら
ああ、迷わずに
どこにいたって 何をしてたって
取り戻しに行こう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, from the day we were born until today
I wonder how much food we've eaten
Thank you every day
If 'delicious' disappears from the table
Ah, without hesitation, wherever you are, whatever you're doing
Let's go and get it back!
